title: Has anyone used Power Dialer integrated with Monday
excerpt: I’ve been using PowerDialer AI to handle outbound calls, and it’s really helped me connect with more prospects efficiently. I recently found out that it supports integration with Monday.com, and I’m wondering if anyone h…

posts.author: SuhanAshraf (Suhan Ashraf)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been using PowerDialer AI to handle outbound calls, and it’s really helped me connect with more prospects efficiently. I recently found out that it supports integration with Monday.com, and I’m wondering if anyone here has tried this setup?
I’love to know how well it works in terms of syncing call data, automating follow-ups, or managing customer interactions and if any particular challenges I should be aware of.
Thanks again.
